studioWorkspace.title: Waryt Furniture sales workspace
studioWorkspace.subtitleManager: Showroom and field teams share one pipeline—managers see org-wide accounts while reps own their rows; access follows Supabase RLS.
studioWorkspace.subtitleRep: Your team’s leads, prospects, performance, and follow-ups for Waryt Furniture—all in one workspace.

overview.quarterDealDescription: Your pipeline wins plus desk sales this UTC quarter (ETB), compared to any personal targets whose dates overlap the quarter.
overview.quarterNoTargetHint: No overlapping personal target for this quarter yet.
overview.creditAlertsDescription: Quick pulse on paying book and open reminders.

overview.label: Overview
overview.description: Team pipeline progress and quick entry points.

interactions.label: Interactions
interactions.description: Customer visit log — contact, purchase, stock, products, B2B/B2C, and marketing tags.

pipeline.label: Pipeline
pipeline.description: Leads by business and contact, stages, industries, and activity logs.

prospects.label: Prospects
prospects.description: Accounts with contact name, email, features of interest, and pain points.

performance.label: Performance
performance.description: Quarter closed revenue vs. dated targets and account momentum.

insights.label: Insights
insights.description: Objections, feature requests, winning plays, and team patterns.

alerts.label: Alerts
alerts.description: Follow-ups and handoffs so showroom and field teams stay aligned.

reporting.label: Reporting
reporting.description: Segments, messaging feedback, and pipeline analytics.

log.label: Sales log
log.description: Log transactions and desk targets (existing CRM tools).

field.label: Challenges
field.description: Log what blocked you with accounts—missed callbacks, gatekeepers, noisy threads—kept private to you and org admins.
